title: MC Reimagined+
description: This pack makes the game beautiful. It adds features that minecraft dont`t have including player animation, incredible render distance, shaders and so much more!
body:
This modpack makes Minecraft what Minecraft really should have looked like. More realistic world generation, good shaders, animations, slightly different textures, multiplayer, controller support, and better colors make the game better than I thought it could be. to make the game smoother, I recommend setting the Memory allocation setting higher.
If you don't know how, here's an explanation.

(Open modrinth and go to library.
Tap Minecraft Reimagined+.
Then click settings and look for where it says Java and memory.
click on Java and memory and look for Memory allocated.
turn on Custom memory allocation, and choose how much memory you want to use)
I have it on 10048, but I have 32gb of ram in my PC. If you have less RAM, I don't recommend having it on as much as I have it on. You can find out for yourself how much your PC can handle.

The texture packages that come with the modpack should be placed in the correct order to work optimally. Find out for yourself what you think is best.

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader)
